name: Domihaus
location: Domihaus the Bloody-Horned in Falkreath Hold, Urgarlag Chief-bane

bonuses.stat: When you deal damage, you create a 10 meter ring of molten earth around you for 10 seconds, which deals 90 Flame damage and 90 Physical damage every 1 second. Standing within the ring grants you 6-300 Weapon and Spell Damage. This effect can occur once every 15 seconds and the damage scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
